message.content:
Design a detailed implementation plan for all remaining UI features from the research document for the African Data Layer React app.

## CONSTRAINT
- Currently 9 serverless functions (api/health, api/auth/register, api/ai/search, api/user, api/submissions/[id], api/auth/[...auth], api/analytics, api/submissions, api/leaderboard). MAX 12 on Vercel Hobby plan.
- ALL new features must be frontend-only (no new API routes) unless absolutely necessary.
- Stack: React + Tailwind CSS + lucide-react icons + Leaflet maps, bilingual EN/FR

## ALREADY IMPLEMENTED (DO NOT PLAN):
1. SyncStatusBar - always-visible sync indicator
2. Assignment card on Home screen
3. Batch capture mode
4. Daily progress widget on Home
5. Streak tracker widget (7-day dots)
6. Badge system (10 badges computed from events)
7. XP popup (basic, post-submission)
8. Quality-weighted leaderboard
9. Submission Queue screen
10. High-contrast mode toggle
11. Agent location pin on map (blue dot)
12. Export panel (CSV/GeoJSON/PDF)
13. Delta reports (partial - has period selection and by-vertical)
14. Client vertical dashboard
15. Step progress indicators (3 steps: Type/Photo/GPS - need to add 4th "Details")

## FEATURES TO IMPLEMENT (grouped by priority):

### P0 - Critical Field Optimization:
A. **Photo overlay guides per vertical** - Camera viewfinder overlay showing vertical-specific frame and tip text (e.g., "Capture the green cross sign and full storefront" for pharmacy). Applied to the photo capture section in ContributionFlow.
B. **GPS confidence indicator** - Visual accuracy bar (●●●●○) showing GPS accuracy during capture in ContributionFlow, next to the GPS readout.
C. **Quality preview before submit** - Pre-submit quality breakdown card showing GPS accuracy score, photo quality score, completeness percentage, and estimated XP. Added before the submit button in ContributionFlow.

### P1 - Productivity:
D. **Smart defaults / auto-fill** - Default to last-used vertical (localStorage), time-based isOpenNow default (Yes 8am-6pm, No otherwise), remember last vertical selection.
E. **Voice input** - Microphone button next to text fields using Web Speech API (SpeechRecognition) with 'fr-CM' locale. Fallback to keyboard when API unavailable.
F. **Weekly target visualization** - "This week: 34/50 target" widget on Profile showing weekly progress bar and bonus XP info.
G. **Proximity bar on map** - Bottom overlay on HomeMap showing count of nearby POIs needing enrichment within 200m.

### P2 - Engagement:
H. **Level-up celebration** - Full-screen overlay animation when user levels up (displayed after XP popup when crossing level threshold). CSS animations: confetti effect, scale-in title.
I. **XP popup animations** - Add CSS keyframe animations to existing XPPopup: count-up animation for XP number, slide-in for breakdown items, pulse on level bar.
J. **Photo capture guidelines per vertical** - Context-specific tip text below the camera section in ContributionFlow showing 2-3 bullets of what to capture.
K. **Add "Details" as 4th step** - Update the step progress indicator to show 4 steps (Type → Photo → GPS → Details) instead of 3.

### P3 - Admin & Advanced:
L. **Admin split-panel for desktop** - Responsive layout for AdminQueue: on screens ≥1024px, show left panel (queue list) and right panel (detail view) side by side.
M. **Admin bulk approve** - Add checkbox selection to low-risk items in AdminQueue + "Approve All Low-Risk" bulk action button.
N. **Map heat map layer** - Toggle button on HomeMap to show/hide a leaflet-heat heatmap layer of submission density.
O. **Assignment zone overlay** - Render assignment zone polygons on the map (if zone geometry exists in CollectionAssignment data).

### P4 - Nice-to-have:
P. **Offline map tiles** - Service worker pre-caching of Leaflet tiles for Bonamoussadi area. Lower priority, complex.

## KEY FILES:
- /components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx - Photo capture, GPS, form fields, step indicators
- /components/Screens/HomeMap.tsx - Leaflet map component
- /components/Screens/Profile.tsx - User dashboard
- /components/Screens/AdminQueue.tsx - Admin review queue
- /components/XPPopup.tsx - XP reward display
- /components/Screens/Home.tsx - Home screen
- /components/Screens/Settings.tsx - Settings
- /index.html - Global CSS
- /shared/verticals.ts - Vertical definitions (colors, icons, labels)

## DESIGN REQUIREMENTS:
- Match existing Tailwind patterns: bg-white p-5 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm
- Section labels: text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest
- Touch targets: minimum 48dp (h-12)
- All strings bilingual EN/FR using t() helper
- Colors: Navy #0f2b46, Terracotta #c86b4a, Forest Green #4c7c59, Gold #f4c317

Please provide a detailed implementation plan with:
1. Exact files to modify
2. What to add/change in each file
3. Dependencies between features
4. Estimated complexity (S/M/L)
5. Order of implementation to minimize conflicts

content.text: I'll start by thoroughly exploring the codebase to understand the existing patterns, then design a detailed implementation plan.

content.text:
I now have a comprehensive understanding of the codebase. Here is the detailed implementation plan.

---

## Detailed Implementation Plan: Remaining UI Features

### Architecture Overview

The app is a single-page React application with Tailwind CSS, using lazy-loaded screen components routed via `App.tsx`. All state is managed locally per component. The bilingual pattern is `t('English', 'French')`. The design system uses `bg-white p-5 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm` cards with `text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest` section labels. There are 9 serverless functions; **no new API routes will be added**.

The step indicators in ContributionFlow already have 4 steps (Type/Photo/GPS/Details) as of the latest code at line 1668, so feature **K** is already implemented. I will exclude it from the plan.

---

### Implementation Order (sequenced to minimize conflicts)

Each feature is tagged with the primary file(s) it touches, complexity, and dependencies.

---

#### Phase 1: ContributionFlow Enhancements (P0 + P1 partial)

These all modify `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx` and should be done sequentially to avoid merge conflicts.

**1. Feature B: GPS Confidence Indicator** [Size: S]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - In the `useEffect` at line 385 that calls `navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition`, switch to `watchPosition` and store `coords.accuracy` in a new state variable `gpsAccuracy: number | null`.
  - In the `getCurrentLocation` promise (line 513), also return and store `accuracy`.
  - In `renderCommonLocationBlock()` (line 1010), add a visual accuracy bar below the GPS readout:
    ```
    ●●●●○  (filled dots based on accuracy thresholds)
    ```
    Thresholds: <=10m = 5 dots (excellent), <=25m = 4, <=50m = 3, <=100m = 2, >100m = 1.
  - Render as a row of 5 circles: `<div className="flex items-center gap-1">` with filled circles as `bg-[#4c7c59]` and empty as `bg-gray-200`.
  - Add bilingual accuracy label: `t('Excellent', 'Excellent')` / `t('Good', 'Bon')` / `t('Fair', 'Moyen')` / `t('Poor', 'Faible')` / `t('Very Poor', 'Tres faible')`.
- **Dependencies:** None.

**2. Feature A: Photo Overlay Guides per Vertical** [Size: M]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx`
- **New constant:** Add a `PHOTO_GUIDE_CONFIG` record keyed by vertical ID at the top of the file (after line 54), containing `{ frameLabel: { en, fr }, tips: Array<{ en, fr }> }` for each vertical. Example:
  - `pharmacy`: `"Capture the green cross sign and full storefront"` / `"Capturez la croix verte et la devanture complete"`
  - `mobile_money`: `"Show the provider logo and agent booth"` / `"Montrez le logo du fournisseur et le stand de l'agent"`
  - `fuel_station`: `"Capture the brand sign and pump area"` / `"Capturez l'enseigne et la zone des pompes"`
  - etc.
- **What to change in `renderPhotoBlock()`** (line 1058):
  - When `!photoPreview` (empty viewfinder state), overlay a semi-transparent guide frame inside the `aspect-square` div. Use `absolute inset-4 border-2 border-dashed border-white/60 rounded-xl` with centered tip text from `PHOTO_GUIDE_CONFIG[vertical]`.
  - Below the photo block (after line 1091), render 2-3 bullet tips from `PHOTO_GUIDE_CONFIG[vertical].tips` in a `text-xs text-gray-500 space-y-1` div. This also covers **Feature J (Photo capture guidelines per vertical)**.
- **Dependencies:** None. This also implements Feature J.

**3. Feature J: Photo Capture Guidelines per Vertical** [Size: S -- covered by Feature A]

Merged into Feature A above. The tip bullets below the camera section come from the same `PHOTO_GUIDE_CONFIG` constant.

**4. Feature D: Smart Defaults / Auto-fill** [Size: S]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - On mount (in existing `useEffect` or a new one), read `localStorage.getItem('adl_last_vertical')`. If it exists and is a valid vertical ID, set it as the default `vertical` state (line ~298, `useState<Vertical>('pharmacy')`). Change the default to: `() => { const saved = localStorage.getItem('adl_last_vertical'); return saved && saved in VERTICALS ? saved as Vertical : 'pharmacy'; }`.
  - On successful submission (in `handleSubmit` success path), write `localStorage.setItem('adl_last_vertical', vertical)`.
  - For `isOpenNow` default: change the initial state (line ~303) to a computed value: `() => { const hour = new Date().getHours(); return hour >= 8 && hour < 18; }`.
- **Dependencies:** None.

**5. Feature C: Quality Preview Before Submit** [Size: M]

- **File:** `/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx`
- **What to change:**
  - Add a new render function `renderQualityPreview()` that computes and displays:
    - **GPS accuracy score**: Based on `gpsAccuracy` state from Feature B. Map accuracy to 0-100 scale (<=10m=100, <=25m=80, <=50m=60, <=100m=40, else 20).
    - **Photo quality score**: 100 if `photoPreview` exists, 0 otherwise. Can add bonus if JPEG EXIF was preserved (check `photoFile?.type`).
    - **Completeness %**: Count filled required fields for the current vertical against total required fields. Use `VERTICALS[vertical].createRequiredFields` or check each field's state.
    - **Estimated XP**: `BASE_EVENT_XP` (5) + quality bonus estimate (0-3 based on GPS+photo scores) + streak bonus placeholder.

#### Phase 5: Nice-to-Have (P4)

**15. Feature P: Offline Map Tiles** [Size: L]

- **File:** New file `/public/sw.js` (service worker)
- **File:** `/index.html` or `/index.tsx` (service worker registration)
- **What to change:**
  - Create a service worker that intercepts tile requests matching `https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png`.
  - On install, pre-cache tiles for the Bonamoussadi area at zoom levels 14-17 (the area defined by `BONAMOUSSADI_CENTER` and the geofence bounds).
  - Use Cache API with a "tiles-v1" cache name.
  - Strategy: cache-first for tiles, network-first for API calls.
  - Registration: add `navigator.serviceWorker.register('/sw.js')` in the app entry.
  - Tile count estimation: Bonamoussadi is a small area. At zoom 14-17, approximately 100-400 tiles. Pre-cache on first load when online.
- **Dependencies:** None, but this is complex and lower priority. Consider deferring.
- **Risk:** Service worker caching can cause stale tile issues. Needs a versioned cache and clear strategy.

### Key Constraints Respected

- **Zero new API routes**: All features are frontend-only. GPS accuracy comes from `navigator.geolocation`. Quality scores are computed client-side. Level thresholds use localStorage. Voice uses Web Speech API. Heatmap uses existing point data.
- **Bilingual**: Every user-visible string uses `t('English', 'French')`.
- **12 serverless function limit**: Unchanged at 9.
- **Feature K already done**: The 4-step indicator (Type/Photo/GPS/Details) is already in the code at line 1668.

### Potential Challenges

1. **Feature E (Voice Input)**: `SpeechRecognition` browser support is inconsistent (no Firefox desktop, limited Safari). The `fr-CM` locale may not be available on all devices -- fallback to `fr-FR` then `fr`.
2. **Feature N (Heatmap)**: `leaflet.heat` needs to be added as a dependency or loaded from CDN. It is not typed, so a `declare module 'leaflet.heat'` stub may be needed.
3. **Feature H (Level-Up)**: Requires knowing the user's previous XP total. Using localStorage is the simplest approach but could get out of sync with server state. Accept this trade-off for a frontend-only solution.
4. **Feature P (Offline Tiles)**: Service workers are complex to debug. Tile pre-caching could consume significant bandwidth on first load. Suggest making it opt-in via Settings.

- `/Users/charlesvictormahouve/Documents/GitHub/africandatalayer/components/Screens/ContributionFlow.tsx` - Central file for 5 features (A, B, C, D, E); contains photo capture, GPS, form fields, step indicators, and submit flow
- `/Users/charlesvictormahouve/Documents/GitHub/africandatalayer/components/Screens/HomeMap.tsx` - Map component for features G, N, O; add proximity bar, heatmap layer, and zone polygons
- `/Users/charlesvictormahouve/Documents/GitHub/africandatalayer/components/XPPopup.tsx` - XP display for feature I animations; entry point for level-up celebration trigger
- `/Users/charlesvictormahouve/Documents/GitHub/africandatalayer/components/Screens/AdminQueue.tsx` - Admin review queue for features L and M; restructure layout and add bulk selection
- `/Users/charlesvictormahouve/Documents/GitHub/africandatalayer/index.html` - Global CSS keyframes for features H and I; animation definitions used across components
